title.ko: 펄스(PULSE)기술(펄스특성의 측정 G01R; 펄스를 갖는 정현파진동의 변조 H03C; 디지털 정보의 전송 H04L; 진동 주기의 계수 또는 적산에 의해 두 신호간 위상차를 검출하는 회로 H03D 3/04; 발생기의 형에 관계없는 또는 특정되어 있지 않은 전자진동 또는 펄스 발생기의 발생기의 자동제어, 시동, 동기화 또는 안정화 H03L; 부호화, 복호화 또는 부호변환 일반 H03M)
title.en: PULSE TECHNIQUE (measuring pulse characteristics G01R;modulating sinusoidal oscillations with pulses H03C; transmission of digital information H04L;discriminator circuits detecting phase difference between two signals by counting or integrating cycles of oscillation H03D0003040000;automatic control, starting, synchronisation or stabilisation of generators of electronic oscillations or pulses where the type of generator is irrelevant or unspecified H03L;coding, decoding or code conversion, in general H03M)

definition.ko: 펄스 생성 회로; 유한 기울기 또는 계단형 부분 H03K3/00; H03K4/00 정현파에서의 펄스 생성 H03K12/00 계수 이외의 펄스 조작 변조; 복조; 변환 H03K7/00; H03K9/00; H03K11/00 기타 H03K5/00, H03K6/00 전자적 스위칭; 논리회로 H03K17/00; 19/00 펄스 카운터, 주파수 분배기 계수 체인 포함; 적분 포함; 폐루프 포함; 다수 안정소자 포함 H03K23/00; H03K25/00; H03K27/00; H03K29/00 세부 H03K21/00 특수 응용 전자 스위칭; 논리회로 H03K17/00; H03K19/00

title.ko: 전기 펄스를 생성하기 위한 회로; 단안정, 쌍안정 또는 다중안정 회로 (H03K4/00이 우선; 컴퓨터의 디지털 함수 생성기용 G06F1/02)
title.en: Circuits for generating electric pulses; Monostable, bistable or multistable circuits (H03K0004000000 takes precedence;for digital function generators in computers G06F0001020000)

title.ko: 세부
title.en: Details
Modifications of generator to compensate for variations in physical values, e.g. voltage, temperature
Modifications of generator to improve response time or to decrease power consumption
Modifications of generator to prevent operation by noise or interference
Modifications of generator to ensure starting of oscillations
Modifications of generator to maintain energy constant

title.ko: 펄스의 폭 또는 충격계수의 조정(펄스폭변조 H03K 7/08)
title.en: Adjustment of width or dutycycle of pulses (pulse width modulation H03K0007080000)

title.ko: 산출 펄스를 이용한 수단에 의하거나 회로의 형에 의한 특성지어진 발생기(H03K 31/64부터 H03K 3/84가 우선)
title.en: Generators characterised by the type of circuit or by the means used for producing pulses (H03K0003640000-H03K0003840000 take precedence)
by the use, as active elements, of more than one type of element or means, e.g. BIMOS, composite devices such as IGBT
by the use of differential amplifiers or comparators, with internal or external positive feedback
Astable circuits
Monostable circuits
Bistable circuits
Multistable circuits
by the use of logic circuits, with internal or external positive feedback
Astable circuits
Monostable circuits
Bistable circuits
Multistable circuits

title.en: by the use, as active elements, of vacuum tubes only, with positive feedback (H03K0003023000, H03K0003027000 take precedence)
using means other than a transformer for feedback
using at least two tubes so coupled that the input of one is derived from the output of another, e.g. multivibrator
astable
Stabilisation of output
monostable
bistable
Bistables with hysteresis, e.g. Schmitt trigger
multistable
using a transformer for feedback, e.g. blocking oscillator with saturable core
specially adapted for amplitude comparison, i.e. Multiar

title.ko: 능동소자로써 내부 또는 외부 양(positive)의 피드백을 갖는 바이폴라 트랜지스터를 사용하는 것 (H03K3/023, H03K3/027이 우선)
title.en: by the use, as active elements, of bipolar transistors with internal or external positive feedback (H03K0003023000, H03K0003027000 take precedence)

title.ko: 피드백을 위해 변압기 이외의 수단을 사용하는 것
title.en: using means other than a transformer for feedback

title.ko: 하나의 입력이 다른 입력의 출력으로부터 유도되도록 결합된 적어도 두 개의 트랜지스터를 사용하는 것, 예. 멀티바이브레이
title.en: using at least two transistors so coupled that the input of one is derived from the output of another, e.g. multivibrator
astable
Stabilisation of output
monostable

title.ko: 쌍안정
title.en: bistable

title.ko: 귀환회로중에 부가트랜지스터를 사용하는 것(H03K 3/2893이 우선)
title.en: using additional transistors in the feedback circuit (H03K0003289000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 입력회로중에 부가트랜지스터를 사용하는 미분구조를 갖는 입력회로
title.en: using additional transistors in the input circuit (H03K0003289000 takes precedence)
the input circuit having a differential configuration
of the primary-secondary type
Bistables with hysteresis, e.g. Schmitt trigger
with an input circuit of differential configuration
multistable
using a transformer for feedback, e.g. blocking oscillator
by the use, as active elements, of semiconductor devices with two electrodes, one or two potential barriers, and exhibiting a negative resistance characteristic
the devices being tunnel diodes
by the use, as active elements, of semiconductor devices exhibiting hole storage or enhancement effect
by the use, as active elements, of semiconductor devices with more than two electrodes and exhibiting avalanche effect

title.ko: 3이상의 PN접합 또는 4이상의 전극 혹은 동일한 전도영역에 접속된 바이폴라 반도체장치를 이용하는 것
title.en: by the use, as active elements, of bipolar semiconductor devices with more than two PN junctions, or more than three electrodes, or more than one electrode connected to the same conductivity region (H03K0003023000, H03K0003027000 take precedence)

title.ko: 단일접합(unijunction) 트랜지스터를 갖는 장치 (H03K 3/352가 우선)
title.en: the devices being unijunction transistors (H03K0003352000 takes precedence)
the devices being thyristors
Anode gate thyristors or programmable unijunction transistors

title.ko: 능동소자로서 내부 또는 외부의 양(positive )의 피드백을 가지는 전계효과 트랜지스터의 사용에 의한 것 (H03K3/023, H03K3/027이 우선)
title.en: by the use, as active elements, of field-effect transistors with internal or external positive feedback (H03K0003023000, H03K0003027000 take precedence)

Bistable circuits
of the primary-secondary type
Bistables with hysteresis, e.g. Schmitt trigger
Multistable circuits
by the use, as active elements, of bulk negative resistance devices, e.g. Gunn-effect devices
by the use, as active elements, of semiconductors, not otherwise provided for

title.ko: 능동소자로써 가스봉입된 관을 이용하는 것, 예. 비안정트리거 회로(H03K 3/55가 우선)
title.en: by the use, as active elements, of gas-filled tubes, e.g. astable trigger circuits (H03K0003550000 takes precedence)
by the use, as active elements, of superconductive devices
by the use, as active elements, of electrochemical cells
by the use, as active elements, of opto-electronic devices, i.e. light-emitting and photoelectric devices electrically- or optically-coupled
by the use, as active elements, of beam deflection tubes
by the use, as active elements, of non-linear magnetic or dielectric devices
the devices being parametrons
the devices being ferro-resonant
the devices being multi-aperture magnetic cores, e.g. transfluxors

by the use of an energy-accumulating element discharged through the load by a switching device controlled by an external signal and not incorporating positive feedback (H03K0003335000 takes precedence)
the switching device being a spark gap
the switching device being a vacuum tube
the switching device being a gas-filled tube having a control electrode
the switching device being a semiconductor device
by the use of galvano-magnetic devices, e.g. Hall-effect devices
Generators producing trains of pulses, i.e. finite sequences of pulses
by interrupting the output of a generator
time intervals between all adjacent pulses of one train being equal
with means for varying repetition rate of trains
Generating a single train of pulses having a predetermined pattern, e.g. a predetermined number

title.ko: 정현파진동의 열의 발생(키잉(keying), 사인파형태(sinusoidal oscillations) 진동의 차단 H03C; 디지털 정보의 전송을 위한 것 H04L)
title.en: Generating trains of sinusoidal oscillations (by keying or interruption of sinusoidal oscillations H03C; for transmission of digital information H04L)
Generating pulses having a predetermined statistical distribution of a parameter, e.g. random pulse generators
Generating pulses by means of delay lines and not covered by the preceding subgroups

title.ko: 유한의 경사 혹은 스탭부분을 실질적으로 갖는 펄스의 발생
title.en: Generating pulses having essentially a finite slope or stepped portions
having stepped portions, e.g. staircase waveform
having parabolic shape

title.ko: 3각파형이 있는 것
title.en: having triangular shape

title.en: having sawtooth shape

in which a sawtooth voltage is produced across a capacitor

using a single tube exhibiting negative resistance between two of its electrodes, e.g. transitron, dynatron
using a tube with negative feedback by capacitor, e.g. Miller integrator
combined with transitron, e.g. phantastron, sanatron

combined with means for generating the driving pulses
using a single tube with positive feedback through a transformer

using a tube operating as an amplifier
with negative feedback through a capacitor, e.g. Miller integrator
combined with means for generating the driving pulses

the starting point of the flyback period being determined by the amplitude of the voltage across the capacitor, e.g. by a comparator
the capacitor being charged from a constant-current source
using two semiconductor devices so coupled that the input of each one is derived from the output of the other, e.g. multivibrator
using a single semiconductor device with positive feedback through a transformer, e.g. blocking oscillator
using a semiconductor device with negative feedback through a capacitor, e.g. Miller integrator

Generators in which the semiconductor device is conducting during the fly-back part of the cycle

using as active elements electrochemical cells

title.ko: 경사파(램프파)의 선형화(펄스의 경사 변형 H03K 6/04; 텔레비전 수신기에 대한 주사 왜곡 정정 H04N 3/23); 펄스 동기화
title.en: Linearisation of ramp (modifying slopes of pulses H03K0006040000;scanning distortion correction for television receivers H04N0003230000); Synchronisation of pulses

title.ko: 정현파형의 일부로부터 되는 파형이 있는 것 (스위칭 동작을 행하지 않은 능동소자를 이용한 진동의 발생 H03B)
title.en: having a waveform comprising a portion of a sinusoid (generating sinusoidal oscillations H03B)
having trapezoidal shape

title.ko: 이 서브클래스의 다른 메인그룹 중 하나에 포함되지 않는 펄스의 조작 (재생작용이 있는 회로 H03K3/00, H03K4/00; 비선형 자기 혹은 유전체장치를 이용하는 것 H03K3/45)
title.en: Manipulation of pulses not covered by one of the other main groups of this subclass (circuits with regenerative action H03K0003000000, H03K0004000000;by the use of non-linear magnetic or dielectric devices H03K0003450000)

definition.ko: 이 그룹내에 있어서는 입력신호는 펄스의 형의 것이다

title.ko: 직류레벨로 변화되는 것 (텔레비전 신호의 직류 성분의 재삽입 H04N5/16)
title.en: Changing the DC level (reinsertion of DC component of a television signal H04N0005160000)

title.ko: 안정화의 기본선(base line)(드레스홀딩 H03K 5/08)
title.en: Base line stabilisation (thresholding H03K0005080000)

title.ko: 펄스의 정형(잡음 또는 간섭의 구분 H03K 5/125)
title.en: Shaping pulses (discrimination against noise or interference H03K0005125000)

title.ko: 증폭에 의한 것(H03K 5/04 우선)
title.en: by amplifying (H03K0005040000 takes precedence)
by increasing duration; by decreasing duration
by the use of clock signals or other time reference signals
by the use of delay lines or other analogue delay elements
by the use of resonant circuits

title.ko: 진폭제한에 의한 것, 자리잡는 치(면적치)에 의한 것, 슬라이스(slice 에 의한 것, 즉 증폭제한과 면적치의 결합에 의하는 것(H03K 5/07이 우선; 1개의 펄스와 다른 펄스와의 비교 H03K 5/22; 스위치 동작을 위하여 소정의 면적치를 설비하는 것 H03K 17/30)
title.en: by limiting, by thresholding, by slicing, i.e. combined limiting and thresholding (H03K0005070000 takes precedence;comparing one pulse with another H03K0005220000;providing a determined threshold for switching H03K0017300000)
by steepening leading or trailing edges

title.ko: 펄스의 구별(개별 펄스 특성을 측정하는 것 G01R 29/02; 텔레비전 장치내 동기신호의 분리 H04N 5/08)
title.en: Discriminating pulses (measuring characteristics of individual pulses G01R0029020000;separation of synchronising signals in television systems H04N0005080000)

title.ko: 잡음 또는 외난의 제한 혹은 억제(특히 전송에 적합한 것 H04B 15/00, H04L 25/08)
title.en: Suppression or limitation of noise or interference (specially adapted for transmission systems H04B0015000000, H04L0025080000)

title.ko: 스위치의 닫음에 의해 발생하는 펄스에 적합한 것, 즉 시간 간격없는(debouncing 회로 G04G 5/00, antibouncing 장치 포함)
title.en: specially adapted for pulses generated by closure of switches, i.e. anti-bouncing devices (debouncing circuits for electronic time-pieces G04G0005000000)

title.ko: 단일의 출력이 있고, 한편 입력신호를 변환해서 소정의 시간 간격이 있는 펄스를 주는 배치
title.en: Arrangements having a single output and transforming input signals into pulses delivered at desired time intervals
Digitally controlled
using a chain of active-delay devices
with field-effect transistors
by the use of time reference signals, e.g. clock signals

title.ko: 지연선을 이용하는 것 (H03K 5/133이 우선)
title.en: by the use of delay lines (H03K0005133000 takes precedence)
by the use of resonant circuits

title.ko: 펄스를 상이한 시간에 몇 개의 출력으로 발생시키는 장치, 즉 펄스 분배기(분배, 스위칭 또는 게이트 장치 H03K 17/00)
title.en: Arrangements in which pulses are delivered at different times at several outputs, i.e. pulse distributors (distributing, switching, or gating arrangements H03K0017000000)
with two complementary outputs

title.ko: 입력신호가 예정된 특성으로 왔을 때 순시에 또는 어느시간 간격을 가지고 1개의 펄스를 주는 배치(영교차에서의 스위칭 H03K 17/13)
title.en: Arrangements in which a pulse is delivered at the instant when a predetermined characteristic of an input signal is present or at a fixed time interval after this instant (switching at zero crossing H03K0017130000)

title.ko: 정상 감지기(각각의 펄스 특성을 측정할 G01R 29/02)
title.en: Peak detectors (measuring characteristics of individual pulses G01R0029020000)
Transition or edge detectors

title.ko: 영교차(Zerocrossing) 감지기(측정회로내 G01R 19/175)
title.en: Zero-crossing detectors (in measuring circuits G01R0019175000)
Arrangements in which a continuous pulse train is transformed into a train having a desired pattern
Applications of delay lines not covered by the preceding subgroups

title.ko: 펄스열의 패턴이 감시(진폭의 지시 G01R 19/00; 주파수의 지시 G01R 23/00; 개개의 펄스의 특성의 측정 G01R 29/02)
title.en: Monitoring patterns of pulse trains (indicating amplitude G01R0019000000;indicating frequency G01R0023000000;measuring characteristics of individual pulses G01R0029020000)

title.ko: 입력신호특성, 예. 경사, 적분에 기초하여 펄스 또는 펄스열을 서로 비교하기 위한 2개 이상의 입력과 1개의 출력을 갖는 회로(2개의 주기적 펄스열의 위상차의 지시 G01R 25/00)
title.en: Circuits having more than one input and one output for comparing pulses or pulse trains with each other according to input signal characteristics, e.g. slope, integral (indicating phase difference of two cyclic pulse trains G01R0025000000)
the characteristic being amplitude
the characteristic being duration, interval, position, frequency, or sequence

title.ko: 이 서브클래스중의 다른 메인그룹 중 하나에 포함되지 않으며 유한 경사를 갖는 펄스의 조작 (재생작용이 있는 회로 H03K4/00)
title.en: Manipulating pulses having a finite slope and not covered by one of the other main groups of this subclass (circuits with regenerative action H03K0004000000)

definition.ko: 이 그룹내에 있어서는 입력신호는 펄스의 형의 것이다.

title.en: Amplifying pulses

title.ko: 펄스 경사의 변형(텔레비전 내S- 정정 H04N 3/23)
title.en: Modifying slopes of pulses, e.g. S-correction (S-correction in television H04N0003230000)
Modulating pulses with a continuously-variable modulating signal
Amplitude modulation, i.e. PAM
Position modulation, i.e. PPM
Frequency or rate modulation, i.e. PFM or PRM

of amplitude-modulated pulses
of position-modulated pulses
of frequency- or rate-modulated pulses
of duration- or width-modulated pulses
of pulses having combined modulation
Transforming types of modulation, e.g. position-modulated pulses into duration-modulated pulses

title.ko: 정현파형의 왜곡 또는 결합에 의한 펄스의 산출(펄스의 정형 H03K 5/01; 스위칭이 아닌 방법으로 동작하는 소자를 이용하는 정현파를 결합 H03B 21/00)
title.en: Producing pulses by distorting or combining sinusoidal waveforms (shaping pulses H03K0005010000;combining sinewaves using elements operating in a non-switching manner H03B0021000000)

title.ko: 전자적 스위칭 또는 게이팅, 즉. 접점 형성 및 접점 차단에 의하지 않는 것 (게이트 증폭기 H03F3/72; 정적장치를 사용하는 교환방법을 위한 스위칭 배치 H04Q3/52)
title.en: Electronic switching or gating, i.e. not by contact-making and -breaking (gated amplifiers H03F0003720000;switching arrangements for exchange systems using static devices H04Q0003520000)
Modifications for accelerating switching
without feedback from the output circuit to the control circuit
by measures taken in the control circuit
Anti-saturation measures
by measures taken in the output circuit
by feedback from the output circuit to the control circuit
Anti-saturation measures
by the use of a transformer
Modifications for ensuring a fully conducting state
Modifications for protecting switching circuit against overcurrent or overvoltage
without feedback from the output circuit to the control circuit
by measures taken in the control circuit
by measures taken in the output circuit
by feedback from the output to the control circuit
Modifications for increasing the maximum permissible switched voltage
Modifications for increasing the maximum permissible switched current

title.ko: 영교차에서 스위칭동작하기 위한 변형(영교차에서의 충격파의 발생 H03K 5/153)
title.en: Modifications for switching at zero crossing (generating an impulse at zero crossing H03K0005153600)
Modifications for compensating variations of physical values, e.g. of temperature
Modifications for eliminating interference voltages or currents
Modifications for indicating state of switch
Modifications for resetting core switching units to a predetermined state

title.ko: 공급전압의 투입시의 소정의 초기상태를 확보하기 위한 변형(쌍안정 발생기 H03K 3/12)
title.en: Modifications for ensuring a predetermined initial state when the supply voltage has been applied (bi-stable generators H03K0003120000)
Storing the actual state when the supply voltage fails
Modifications for temporary blocking after receipt of control pulses

title.ko: 스위칭동작전에 시간지연을 도입하기 위한 변형(2이상의 스위칭동작을 실행하기 위하여 시간간격이 선택될 수 있도록 변형 H03K 17/296)
title.en: Modifications for introducing a time delay before switching (modifications to provide a choice of time-intervals for executing more than one switching action H03K0017296000)
